news_headlines.title: [Form 4] Dell Technologies Inc. Insider Trading Activity
news_headlines.summary: Dell Technologies Inc. director-affiliated Silver Lake entities reported open-market sales of 459,999 shares of Class C Common Stock on March 23, 2026. The shares were sold at weighted-average prices ranging from $160.00 to $164.6857 per share across multiple transactions. Dell director Egon Durban, Co-CEO of Silver Lake Group, continues to beneficially own 1,252,345 Class C shares directly, plus additional indirect interests.

news_headlines.title: Dell Technologies Inc: Silver Lake Group sells $74.6m in shares
news_headlines.summary: Silver Lake Group and affiliated entities sold $74.6 million worth of Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) Class C Common Stock on March 23, 2026, with share prices ranging from $160.6 to $164.18. This sale occurred as Dell's stock has shown strong performance, currently trading at $176.91, up nearly 10% from the sale prices and 41% year-to-date. Dell has also recently announced product enhancements including quantum-ready security features for PCs, improvements to its AI Data Platform with NVIDIA technologies, and new AI workstations.

news_headlines.title: Dell Technologies Inc. sees $74.6 million in class C stock sold
news_headlines.summary: Entities associated with Silver Lake sold $74.6 million worth of Dell Technologies Inc. Class C Common Stock on March 23, 2026, with shares trading near their 52-week high after the transaction. Dell also announced security enhancements with quantum-ready features for its commercial PCs, AI Data Platform upgrades incorporating NVIDIA technologies, and new AI workstations. Despite these positive developments for Dell, Raymond James reiterated an Outperform rating for Super Micro Computer amidst an indictment related to illegal exports of Nvidia GPU-based servers.

news_headlines.title: Dell Technologies Inc: Silver Lake Partners sell $49.3m in shares
news_headlines.summary: Silver Lake Partners, a significant shareholder in Dell Technologies Inc, has sold 299,933 shares of Class C Common Stock for approximately $49.3 million on March 20, 2026. This transaction comes as Dell's stock has climbed to $176.91, near its 52-week high, delivering an 80% return over the past year. In other news, Dell is enhancing its product offerings with quantum-ready security features for PCs and AI data platform improvements leveraging NVIDIA technologies.

news_headlines.title: Silver Lake funds trim Dell (DELL) stake after converting 616,993 Class B shares
news_headlines.summary: Silver Lake-affiliated funds converted 616,993 shares of Dell (DELL) Class B stock into Class C shares and subsequently sold 299,979 Class C shares on the open market. The sales occurred across multiple transactions at weighted average prices of approximately $163.51, $164.60, and $165.49 per share. Egon Durban, a Dell director and senior Silver Lake executive, is noted to have an indirect pecuniary interest in some of these holdings and a direct holding of 1,252,345 Class C shares.

news_headlines.title: Silver Lake funds trim Dell (DELL) stake with 459,999 Class C share sales
news_headlines.summary: Silver Lake-affiliated funds have reduced their stake in Dell Technologies (DELL) by selling 459,999 Class C common shares on March 23, 2026, in open-market transactions. The sales occurred at weighted average prices ranging from $160.00 to $164.6857 per share, as detailed in a recent SEC Form 4 filing. Despite these sales, the funds and related entities, including Director Egon Durban, retain significant holdings in Dell.

news_headlines.title: Silver Lake entities trim Dell (NYSE: DELL) stake with Class B-to-C conversions
news_headlines.summary: Silver Lake-affiliated entities, acting as 10% owners and directors by deputization, reported insider activity in Dell Technologies Inc. On March 20, 2026, these entities converted 616,993 shares of Class B Common Stock into an equal number of Class C shares and subsequently sold 299,979 Class C shares in open-market transactions, priced between $163.00 and $165.9992 per share. Despite these sales, Silver Lake retains significant holdings in Dell, including over 1.25 million Class C shares and substantial Class B holdings, indicating a partial reduction rather than a full exit.

news_headlines.title: Why Dell Stock Is Rising Today
news_headlines.summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) shares are up today following the company's announcement of new security enhancements for device trust, cyber resilience, and AI data platform threat detection. These updates include quantum-ready protections for PCs and AI-powered tools to detect ransomware. Additionally, a B of A Securities analyst maintained a Buy rating and increased Dell's price target from $155 to $172.

news_headlines.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Western Digital (WDC) After Its 3-Year 10x Share Price Surge?
news_headlines.summary: Western Digital's stock has surged over 10x in the last three years, leading investors to question its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests WDC is overvalued by 14.5% at US$294.79, with an intrinsic value of US$257.49 per share. However, its P/E ratio of 25.33x is lower than Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 40.29x, indicating it might be undervalued based on company-specific factors. The article presents bull and bear case narratives, with fair values ranging from US$170 to US$440 per share, to help investors make informed decisions.
